---
title: Mairie du 14eme
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557449/mairie14_20211010_wtdlde.png
description: Mairie, Paris 14
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/10/10
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557449/mairie14_20211010_wtdlde.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
